title: Faithful 32x Universal Ores
description: Changes the universal ores textures to blend with faithful 32x
body:
This resource pack replaces the default textures of the universal ores mod with 32x versions of every stone type plus ores and shades. It uses the faithful textures and shades so it blends with faithful 32x. Credit to the [faithful team](https://faithfulpack.net/) and to [hugman_76](https://modrinth.com/user/Hugman). This is now also on the official faithful mod repository [here](https://github.com/Faithful-Resource-Pack/Faithful-32x-Mods/tree/1.20.1).
The pictures are from version 1.0 not 1.1 so they don't have the side textures or the new shadows for the nether ores.
